observations.title: ROUND_ALL_MEMBERS_SKIPPED 遷移は新設計で dead code になる
observations.rationale: coordinator が 'escalation' でなく 'approved' 相当を返すようになると、when: s => error.code === ROUND_ALL_MEMBERS_SKIPPED の条件は永遠に発火しない。実装時に削除または保守注記を入れることを推奨する。

observations.title: applyRoundResults の allMembersSkipped ガードは新設計でも維持が必要
observations.rationale: 要件 5（skip が恒久 free-pass にならない）を満たすには、all-skip 時に members を 'pending' のままにする既存ガード (!allMembersSkipped) を roundError 廃止後も残す必要がある。

observations.title: 後方回復経路は commitRound の error: roundError 上書きで自然に成立する
observations.rationale: commitRound は常に error: roundError で state.error を上書きする。新設計で roundError=null を渡せば既存 job の sticky ROUND_ALL_MEMBERS_SKIPPED も resume 時にクリアされ、終端 seam が発火しなくなる。実装上の追加対応は不要。

toolResult.reason:
Wrote design.md, spec.md, tasks.md under specrunner/changes/round-all-skip-pass-through/ on branch change/round-all-skip-pass-through-9141b6e6.

Change plan: reverse the `custom-reviewer-canon-binding` D6 decision (all-skip → escalation) so a round where every custom reviewer member skips (activation mismatch) becomes a structural skip that passes the gate green, while preserving canon binding (D1–D5/D7).

Decisions:
- D1: aggregateVerdict — remove the "non-empty all-skipped → escalation" branch so all-skip aggregates to approved (verdict vocabulary kept; per-member verdict stays "skipped"; escalation short-circuit + needs-fix priority unchanged).
- D2: parallel-review-round.ts — stop setting ROUND_ALL_MEMBERS_SKIPPED roundError; roundError stays null, and commitRound's `state.error = roundError` clears any sticky error (basis for backward recovery, req 6). Keep the diag log.
- D3: keep the applyRoundResults-suppression guard so all-skip members stay "pending" (not finalized "skipped") — avoids permanent free-pass, re-evaluated each round (req 5).
- D4: pipeline.ts — delete the terminal-seam ROUND_ALL_MEMBERS_SKIPPED → awaiting-resume branch (single awaiting-archive path).
- D5: reviewer-chain.ts — delete the coordinator escalation→regression-gate routing keyed on ROUND_ALL_MEMBERS_SKIPPED; skip+error mixed rounds then fall to default escalate → awaiting-resume (req 3 preserved).
- D-journal: per-member skip evidence (step-attempt record + `<member>-skipped` transition, with skipReason) is already journaled via the members array → commitRound → store.persist; preserve it, no new event type (req 2).

Verified: executor activation gate (req 4) and canon binding are untouched. Documented test-impact list (reviewer-status.test.ts, parallel-review-round-canon.test.ts, reviewer-activation-e2e.test.ts) for implementation-notes and destruction-confirmation notes. Implementation is left to the downstream implementer per tasks.md.
